ddls:
CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license (e.g., MIT, GPL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the license terms */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., open-source, proprietary) */,
  "license_url" TEXT /* URL to the full license text */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the license was added to the system */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the license information was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance note */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the license associated with the note */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance requirement */,
  "ub" INTEGER /* Whether the note applies to the User Base (UB) */,
  "mb" INTEGER /* Whether the note applies to the Maintenance Branch (MB) */,
  "us" INTEGER /* Whether the note applies to the User Support (US) */,
  "ms" INTEGER /* Whether the note applies to the Management System (MS) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the compliance note was added to the system */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the compliance note was last updated */,
  "compliance_requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance requirement (e.g., license, copyright, patent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_notes_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Overview or description of the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Current compliance status of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user responsible for managing the project */,
  "compliance_officer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user responsible for ensuring project compliance */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_compliance_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("compliance_officer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_licenses" (
  "project_license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-license mapping */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the license */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the license used in the project */,
  "license_usage" TEXT /* Description of how the license is being used in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_licenses_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_licenses_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modifications" (
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project where the modification occurred */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date of the modification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what was modified */,
  "modified_by_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the modification */,
  "modification_type" TEXT /* Type of modification made (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modifications_modified_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modifications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, compliance officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., development, legal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project being audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the audit (e.g., Compliant, Non-Compliant) */,
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who conducted the audit */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit conducted (e.g., scheduled, unscheduled) */,
  "audit_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or findings from the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_audits_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_audits_auditor_id FOREIGN KEY ("auditor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., compliance issue, update) */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
